data.title: Oracle Plans $40 Billion Nvidia Chip Purchase for OpenAI Data Center
data.description: According to BlockBeats, Oracle is set to invest $40 billion in acquiring Nvidia chips to support OpenAI's new data center in the United States. This strategic move aims to enhance the capabilities and performance of OpenAI's infrastructure, leveraging Nvidia's advanced technology. The acquisition underscores Oracle's commitment to expanding its technological resources and supporting innovative AI developments.

data.title: Analyst Says Full-Blown Altseason Has Started, Outlines Path Forward for Dogecoin, Floki and Pepe
data.description:
An analyst known for making timely crypto calls believes that altcoins may have now entered a massive uptrend after Bitcoin (BTC) hit new all-time highs this week. Pseudonymous analyst Bluntz tells his 306,000 followers on the social media platform X that altcoins may start outperforming Bitcoin as the digital assets are suddenly flashing bullish.
source: https://dailyhodl.com/2025/05/23/analyst-says-full-blown-altseason-has-started-outlines-path-forward-for-dogecoin-floki-and-pepe/

data.title: ‘In ‘93, it became clear to me AI should be decentralized’ — Ben Goertzel
data.description:
It’s been 30 years since computer scientist Ben Goertzel wrote his first line of AI code, already convinced that artificial intelligence should be decentralized. Today, as the world approaches the dawn of Artificial General Intelligence (AGI), who leads this breakthrough could have profound consequences for the future of humanity. Speaking with Cointelegraph at the Consensus conference in Toronto, Canada, Goertzel said, “We’re likely to be able to launch AGI that can think and generalize beyond its training and programming within the next one to three years. ”His project, SingularityNET, is a decentralized ecosystem building a global marketplace for AI services
source: https://cointelegraph.com/news/ben-goertzel-ai-decentralization-interview?utm_source=rss_feed&utm_medium=rss&utm_campaign=rss_partner_inbound

data.title: Crypto, NFTs are a lifeboat in the sinking fiat system: Finance Redefined
data.description:
Risk appetite across traditional and cryptocurrency markets saw a sharp rise this week, helping United States cryptocurrency funds recover the capital lost to the correction of February and March, amassing over $7. 5 billion worth of weekly inflows. Bitcoin (BTC) surpassed its old all-time high on May 21, two days after President Donald Trump confirmed ongoing ceasefire negotiations between Russia and Ukraine in a May 19 X post. Meanwhile, popular analyst and Global Macro Investor CEO Raoul Pal warned of more fiat currency debasement, urging investors to gain more exposure to cryptocurrencies and non-fungible tokens (NFTs), as these assets “will never be this cheap again
source: https://cointelegraph.com/news/crypto-nfts-lifeboat-sinking-fiat-system-finance-redefined?utm_source=rss_feed&utm_medium=rss&utm_campaign=rss_partner_inbound

data.title: It’s going to take Apple more than 4 years to bring manufacturing back to America
data.description:
Apple is under direct pressure from President Donald Trump, who is back in the White House and demanding that the tech giant shift its iPhone production into the United States — or face tariffs of 25% or higher. Trump made the threat in a public post, saying the company would be punished if it keeps […]
source: https://www.cryptopolitan.com/apple-more-than-4-years-manufacturing-us/

data.title: VeChain Appoints Former IBM and Deloitte Blockchain Exec as Marketing Director
data.description:
VeChain has hired enterprise blockchain strategist Anthony Day as Marketing Director, strengthening outreach beyond crypto. Drawing on posts at IBM, Deloitte, Parity and Midnight, Day now guides promotion of VeBetter, a platform that tokenizes real-world impact and rewards sustainable actions.
source: https://cryptonews.com/news/vechain-hires-ibm-deloitte-veteran-marketing-director/

data.title: Ledn Transitions to Custodied Bitcoin Loan Model, Phases Out Yield Lending
data.description:
TL;DR Ledn will stop offering ETH-backed loans and crypto yield accounts, shifting its entire operation to Bitcoin-backed loans starting in July. The company will eliminate any counterparty risk by directly holding all collateral and ending institutional asset lending. From July, Ledn will lower its annual rate to 12. 9% and let users release part of their. . . 
source: https://crypto-economy.com/ledn-transitions-to-custodied-bitcoin-loan-model-phases-out-yield-lending/

data.title: Crypto Heist in London: Tourist Drugged & Robbed of $123K in Bitcoin
data.description:
In a shocking incident that has sent ripples through the bustling streets of London, a tourist fell victim to a meticulously planned crypto heist, during which they were drugged and subsequently robbed of a staggering sum of $123,000 in Bitcoin. The event unfolded in a popular area frequented by visitors, highlighting not only the risks associated with digital currencies but also the lengths to which criminals will go in order to exploit unsuspecting individuals.
source: https://voiceofcrypto.online/ampstories/web-stories/crypto-heist-in-london-tourist-drugged-robbed-of-123k-in-bitcoin

data.title: Strategy Slumps 6%, Leading Crypto Names Lower as Bitcoin Treasury Strategies Are Questioned
data.description:
Crypto stocks suffered a red day on Friday, especially bitcoin BTC treasury companies such as Strategy (MSTR) and Semler Scientific (SMLR) — each down roughly 6% even as bitcoin slipped only a bit more than 2%. Japan-listed Metaplanet is lower by 24%.The price action comes amid a continuing debate taking place on social media about the sustainability of Michael Saylor’s (and those copycatting him) bitcoin-vacuuming playbook.“Bitcoin treasury companies are all the rage this week
source: https://www.coindesk.com/markets/2025/05/23/strategy-slumps-6-leading-crypto-names-lower-as-bitcoin-treasury-strategies-are-questioned
